summary: Iter40 multi-layer URL extraction acceptance: 10/10 backend pytests + frontend smoke pass. CRITICAL E&V test passes — POST /api/invest/ingest with https://www.engelvoelkers.com/gr/en/exposes/0e03e66b-9954-5a5c-ba49-efac6f5435d8 returns asking_price_eur=1180000, m2=406, rooms=4, bathrooms=3, year_built=2005, renovation_state='refresh', city='Athens', neighborhood contains 'Adames', property_type='Villa', listing_source contains 'Engel', and price_per_sqm_eur computed. _confidence map contains all 16 required keys (asking_price_eur, m2, city, rooms, bathrooms, floor, energy_class, parking, renovation_state, property_type, listing_source, url, year_built, neighborhood, description, price_per_sqm_eur) with values strictly in {verified, needs_review, missing, user_verified}. Invalid-domain URL returns 200 with all critical fields = 'missing' confidence (no 500). Airbnb URL returns 200 with full conf map populated (graceful degradation). Empty url → 400. Non-http url (ftp://) → 400. Drafts: POST /api/invest/draft persists, GET retrieves, PUT correctly flips per-field _confidence to 'user_verified' for fields user supplies (verified floor=2 → conf['floor']='user_verified', energy_class='C' → conf['energy_class']='user_verified'). Regression: /api/properties/demo, /api/upgrade/cart, /api/payments/checkout, /api/invest/analyze all <500. FRONTEND: /invest landing renders invest-url-input + invest-manual-cta. Pasting E&V URL triggers invest-live-preview, all 5 phase chips (invest-preview-phase-0..4) render, 'LIVE PREVIEW READY' chip appears with property summary '406 sq.m. detached house in Adames, Ki…', and CTA text auto-swaps from 'Analyze Investment' to 'OPEN ACQUISITION VERDICT' at ~13s (well within 28s safety). /invest/asset/demo cinematic still works → invest-dashboard renders → invest-section-final-verdict reads 'PASS at €137,080'. /invest/asset/manual renders dashboard. VerifyChecklist gate verified via Airbnb URL: invest-verify-checklist visible, 12 verify-badge-* testids render. Source labels in BADGE map exactly match user prescription ('Verified from listing', 'User Verified', 'Estimated by VELA', 'Not found') with old labels 'Needs Review' / 'Missing' fully absent (rendered as uppercase via CSS). /operate route still renders.
critical_code_review_comments: E&V multi-layer extraction pipeline performs as advertised — JSON-LD priority for floorSize/numberOfBedrooms/numberOfRooms/yearBuilt/address.addressLocality is wired correctly and recursive offers walker handles nested priceSpecification.price. Extracted 14/15 fields against the live E&V URL on the first attempt, with all critical investment fields = 'verified'.

Confidence map shape is now stable across happy path (E&V), partial (Airbnb blocked), and failure (invalid domain) — no 500s in any path. listing_source and url being pinned to 'verified' regardless of scrape outcome is correct since they're input-derived.

Live Preview 28s hard-stop via Promise.race is well-targeted: actual E&V scrape clocked at ~10-13s in this run, leaving safe headroom. Phase chips animate cleanly and CTA text-swap to 'OPEN ACQUISITION VERDICT' is sharp.

VerifyChecklist label rename verified at source: BADGE map literals are exactly 'Verified from listing' / 'User Verified' / 'Estimated by VELA' / 'Not found'. CSS uppercases on render — searches for raw mixed-case strings in DOM body fail, but verify-badge-* testid contents and screenshot confirm the user-prescribed labels are the source-of-truth strings.

VerifyChecklist gate is correctly skipped for high-confidence E&V flow (all critical fields verified) and correctly appears for low-confidence Airbnb flow (all critical fields = NOT FOUND). The conditional gate logic works as designed.
Pre-existing /api/me 401 console noise persists (carry-over from iter34+). Not a regression — flagged again in case main agent wants to silence.
Manual route — invest-edit-panel testid exists in InvestChrome.jsx but is opened on user click rather than rendered by default. Iter39 already verified this UI; not a regression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (live preview + cinematic + manual + verify gate + operate)

seed_data_creation: One ephemeral draft created via POST /api/invest/draft for E&V data (test_draft_create_get_update_user_verified). Not cleaned up — backend uses Mongo with iter-prefixed test data identifiable by url=engelvoelkers test fixture; advise periodic cleanup if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter40 ships clean. Multi-layer E&V extraction is live and verified end-to-end. KEY TESTABLE SURFACES: (1) POST /api/invest/ingest with the E&V URL must return price=1180000, m2=406, rooms=4, bathrooms=3, year_built=2005, renovation_state='refresh', city='Athens', neighborhood contains 'Adames', property_type='Villa'. _confidence map has 16 keys with values strictly in {verified, needs_review, missing, user_verified}. (2) Invalid domain → 200 with critical fields = 'missing' conf, listing_source/url = 'verified'. (3) Airbnb → 200 partial extraction (bot-blocked). (4) Empty/non-http URL → 400. (5) /api/invest/draft POST/GET/PUT flow — PUT flips per-field conf to 'user_verified' on user-supplied fields. (6) /invest landing — invest-url-input + 1.2s debounce → invest-live-preview with phases 0..4 → 'LIVE PREVIEW READY' chip + property summary → CTA swaps 'Analyze Investment' → 'OPEN ACQUISITION VERDICT' (<13s for E&V, 28s safety hard-stop for blocked portals). (7) Click analyze → if all critical fields verified → skips to thinking; if any low-conf → invest-verify-checklist gate appears with verify-badge-{field} testids displaying labels 'Verified from listing' / 'User Verified' / 'Estimated by VELA' / 'Not found' (CSS uppercases on screen). Old labels 'Needs Review' / 'Missing' fully removed from BADGE map. (8) /invest/asset/demo cinematic → invest-section-final-verdict reads 'PASS at €137,080'. (9) /invest/asset/manual loads dashboard. (10) Console errors: only pre-existing /api/me 401 noise — benign.
rca of the issue: No bugs surfaced. One minor test correction made: bumped requests timeout from 10s → 30s on test_ingest_non_http_400 (transient network read timeout against preview ingress, not a server defect — direct curl confirms server returns 400 in 0.7s). All 10 backend tests + frontend smoke flows green.
